name: Louisiana Crawfish Quiche
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup Half 'n Half or light cream
recipeInstructions:
1. Saute mushrooms and green onions in butter until tender. Set aside.
2. In a large bowl, combine eggs, milk, salt, dry mustard, nutmeg, and cheese.
3. Fold in crawfish, mushrooms, and onions.
4. Pour the mixture into the pie shell.
5. Bake at 400°F for 15 minutes.
6. Reduce heat to 300°F and continue baking for 30 minutes or until a knife inserted in the center comes out clean.
7. Allow to stand 5 minutes before serving.
